task_completion.description: Navigate to the SMS Server Settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus interface with the 'SMS Server Settings' page open.

task_completion.description: Select a custom or HTTP-based SMS provider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see an option for 'Custom' or 'HTTP-based' SMS provider selected in a dropdown or radio button.
The VLM should see the URL 'https://api.bulksmsgateway.net/v2/send' entered in the Gateway URL input field.

task_completion.description: Select POST as the HTTP Method.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see 'POST' selected in the HTTP Method dropdown or radio button.

The VLM should see the parameters entered in the interface: 'apiKey' with value 'f8c3a9d1b7e24056be91dc3a47f6e8a0', 'sender' with value 'ADAuditSec', 'to' with value '%mobile%', and 'message' with value '%message%'.
The VLM should see a success message indicating the settings were saved, or the final configuration screen showing the entered details after clicking a 'Save' button.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface in a browser, not a terminal or command prompt.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the authentic ADAudit Plus dashboard and settings pages, not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use automated scripts or API calls outside the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show manual entry or browser automation within the web interface, without terminal windows running curl or python scripts to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Gateway URL is 'https://api.bulksmsgateway.net/v2/send'. The HTTP Method must be 'POST'. The required parameters are: apiKey='f8c3a9d1b7e24056be91dc3a47f6e8a0', sender='ADAuditSec', to='%mobile%', message='%message%'. The configuration should be done on the 'SMS Server Settings' page in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
